englishDefinitions: To lead people into different directions, choices, or outcomes.
persianTranslation: ما را به مسیرهای مختلف بردن
ما را به راه‌های متفاوت کشاندن
examples: Our different interests took us down different paths after college.
One small decision can take us down different paths.
The story shows how tragedy can take us down different paths.
